symptoms: Mobile app v4.2 users unable to reach any API endpoints on iOS
Browser console: 'CORS policy: No Access-Control-Allow-Origin header'
Affects only requests from app version sending X-App-Version: 4.2
hypotheses_tested: New gateway CORS policy whitelisted specific Origin headers
confirmed_root_cause: New gateway CORS policy whitelisted specific Origin headers. Mobile app v4.2 sends a new custom header X-App-Version not in the allowed headers list, causing preflight to fail
resolution_action: Added X-App-Version to Access-Control-Allow-Headers in gateway CORS config
